title: Avery Dennison (AVY) Tops Q1 Earnings Estimates, Ups '22 View
text: Avery Dennison (AVY) expects adjusted EPS between $9.45 and $9.85 for the current year.

title: Avery Dennison (AVY) Surpasses Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Avery Dennison (AVY) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 10.09% and 2.18%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Avery Dennison Announces First Quarter 2022 Results
text: MENTOR, Ohio--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE:AVY) today announced preliminary, unaudited results for its first quarter ended April 2, 2022. Non-GAAP financial measures referenced in this document are reconciled to GAAP in the attached financial schedules. title: What's in the Offing for Avery Dennison's (AVY) Q1 Earnings?
text: Avery Dennison's (AVY) Q1 performance is likely to reflect higher demand for consumer products, growth in high-value product categories and margin benefits from productivity and cost actions.

title: Analysts Estimate Avery Dennison (AVY) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
text: Avery Dennison (AVY) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
